questions.objective_ref: Define CoT prompting and explain why step-by-step reasoning improves output quality on multi-step problems
Distinguish zero-shot CoT from few-shot CoT and state when each is appropriate
Write a zero-shot CoT prompt by adding a step-by-step reasoning instruction
Write a few-shot CoT prompt that includes at least two input-reasoning-answer triples
Identify tasks where CoT helps most vs where it adds overhead without benefit
Apply CoT prompting in a Python client.messages.create() call using the Anthropic API
Recall the three parts of a CoT reasoning triple (input, reasoning chain, final answer)
